name: [XS] reaction-e2e-test-refinements
description:
tech-debt from thumbs-down-reaction-not-interested e2e review (nauipbt0):

1. tests/test_command_router.py:399-419 — current Gap B reaction block (chat_id=999, message_id=99999) is functionally identical to existing TestProcessReaction::test_miss. Replace with proper collision-case reaction: (chat_id=200, message_id=42, from_id=1). Assert: silent return (no Telegram reply), store.list_for(profile_a.id) unchanged, profile_b still has no NotInterested entries. Directly expresses User Story 5 (cross-chat suppression prevention) through the reaction path.

2. tests/test_command_router.py:256-419 — once #1 lands, split test_e2e_suppression_chain into three focused methods: test_e2e_suppression_chain (steps 1-7), test_e2e_different_dates_not_suppressed (Gap A), test_e2e_chat_id_pk_isolation (Gap B). A future failure should point immediately at which invariant broke.

Tests must still pass: .venv/bin/pytest.

name: [XS] reaction-master-review-nits
description:
tech-debt from thumbs-down-reaction-not-interested master review (1ygbv8su/4m8gmise):

1. src/campcli/application/command_router.py:_process_reaction — try/except ValueError: pass on ni_repo.add() duplicates is intentional (per PRD US9 idempotent double-tap), but diverges from /not-interested handler which returns an error on duplicate. Add a one-line comment explaining the intentional divergence.

2. src/campcli/domain/ports.py — document the chat_id type asymmetry: TelegramUpdate.chat_id is str (matches Bot API JSON shape); TelegramReactionUpdate.chat_id is int (cleaner for the lookup_sent composite key). Future devs adding a third update type need this rationale.

3. tests/test_command_router.py:256-419 — test_e2e_suppression_chain is 163 lines covering 7 behavioral claims. Split into focused methods (suppression / different-dates / cross-chat / etc.) once the e2e-refinements task above lands (collision case).

Tests must still pass: .venv/bin/pytest.
